name: audioTest
summary: Browser audio checkpoint player with authenticated session persistence and remote storage support

nodes.name: src/public/index.html
nodes.summary: Static application shell that loads the frontend runtime and helper scripts

features.summary: Declares the login, post-login module dashboard, INGEST workflow with phase-gated Back, Guide, and Logout controls, player, guide panes, standalone audEp loading block, title text outside the player border, and a post-progress full-width audSeg note editor sized to the standard input height without placeholder text and loads the auth storage, shared formatting helpers, session runtime, full app runtime, and compatibility bootstrap in a single startup path

nodes.name: src/frontend/modules/app-runtime.js
nodes.summary: Frontend orchestrator for login, audio playback, session persistence, restore flow, exact UI-state and focus resume snapshots after inactivity/logout, guide interactions, cycle-select and locked-target span labeling without restored boundary tags, focus-preserving rich editor playback refreshes, focus-preserving comment bubble playback rerenders, rich child-card creation and subsumed-child reparenting from selected fragments with one-shot Enter suppression and temporary trace logging, multiline-aware selection bubble rendering with detailed console diagnostics, lower-right comment bubble rich inputs on subSeg cards with 72 percent text sizing, native Space and Enter text entry, Ctrl+Space playback toggling, vertically reserved bubble flow that pushes lower cards down instead of overlapping them, Tab transfers between comment bubbles and their owning rich inputs, explicit Ctrl+Backspace returns to the owning rich input without clearing the bubble target, and both the subSeg panel and player section are excluded from tab targets while preserving modifier-safe rich-card navigation, Enter-to-bubble focus transfer with unwindable path history, descendant focus chain selection across ancestor bubbles, Ctrl+Shift+Backspace delete-dialog toggling with cancel focus, previous-card delete return, and tab-selectable dialog actions, and finer checkpoint line dragging with shared helpers

features.summary: Coordinates a post-login module dashboard with keyboard navigation, the INGEST audio workflow with phase-gated Back, Guide, and Logout controls, session save and restore, exact UI-state and focus resume snapshots after inactivity/logout, player controls, guide state, cycle-select and locked-target span labeling, boundary tag suppression limited to the selected audSeg span during cycling and after selection, focus-preserving refreshes for active rich subSeg editors during playback ticks, focus-preserving comment bubble rerenders during playback ticks, Ctrl+Enter blank-card insertion in focused rich subSeg editors, wraparound Ctrl+Up/Down navigation between rich subSeg cards with immediate focus switching, rich child creation and subsumed-child reparenting from selected fragments in focused rich subSeg editors with one-shot Enter suppression and temporary trace logging, multiline-aware selection bubble rendering for rich subSeg editors with detailed console diagnostics, modifier-safe rich-card navigation, vertically reserved comment-bubble flow that keeps the lower cards pushed down while Enter remains native and Ctrl+Space toggles playback, Tab transfers between comment bubbles and their owning rich inputs, explicit Ctrl+Backspace returns to the owning rich input without clearing the bubble target, and both the subSeg panel and player section are excluded from tab targets while preserving modifier-safe rich-card navigation, Enter-to-bubble focus transfer with unwindable path history, descendant focus chain selection across ancestor bubbles, Ctrl+Shift+Backspace delete-dialog toggling with cancel focus, previous-card delete return, and tab-selectable dialog actions, mirror wrap alignment corrected to match editor line breaking, nearest-match fallback for selection anchors and repeated one-character children, removal of visible ordinal badges from parent-child selection markers, finer checkpoint line dragging, and a post-progress full-width audSeg rich-text note editor sized to the standard input height that opens by default on Enter, keeps Space and Enter as native text entry, toggles playback only on Ctrl+Space, and lets Tab return focus to the page while the lower audSeg progress bar is nudged downward by ~10px and the project focus indicators now use blue across inputs, cards, and the player container with a softened parent focus ring when the rich input is active while still toggling from the audSeg tag click through delegated overlay interaction and keeping the audEp title text outside the player border

nodes.name: src/frontend/modules/format-utils.js
nodes.summary: Shared browser formatting and lightweight sub-segment normalization helpers

features.summary: Formats timestamps and durations and normalizes basic sub-segment structures used throughout the frontend

nodes.name: src/frontend/modules/auth-storage.js
nodes.summary: Shared browser helper for login persistence, resume-state persistence, and auth header construction

features.summary: Persists login state in localStorage, stores per-user resume snapshots for post-login UI recovery, restores active sessions, and builds request headers for authenticated API calls

nodes.name: src/frontend/modules/session-runtime.js
nodes.summary: Session lifecycle helper for list/load/save/delete and audio blob conversion

features.summary: Loads persisted sessions, handles save/delete/reload conflicts, uploads audio blobs, and converts stored audio payloads for restore

nodes.name: src/frontend/app.js
nodes.summary: Minimal bootstrap shim that loads the frontend dependency chain if needed

features.summary: Provides a compatibility entrypoint that only falls back to loading auth storage, shared helpers, session runtime, and the full frontend runtime if they were not already loaded

nodes.name: src/backend/server.js
nodes.summary: HTTP server facade that wires together config, auth, storage, and remote session modules

features.summary: Routes authenticated session and audio requests, enforces conflict checks, and delegates data access to focused backend modules

nodes.name: src/backend/config.js
nodes.summary: Shared backend paths, ports, and environment-derived flags

features.summary: Centralizes filesystem roots, login TTL, and remote storage configuration for the backend runtime

nodes.name: src/backend/utils.js
nodes.summary: HTTP request, body, and streaming helpers for the backend

features.summary: Parses URLs and request bodies, emits JSON responses, and streams files and ranged audio content

nodes.name: src/backend/auth.js
nodes.summary: In-memory auth session tracking and request validation

features.summary: Normalizes usernames, issues short-lived auth tokens, and guards request handlers that require a logged-in user

nodes.name: src/backend/session-store.js
nodes.summary: Session record normalization, listing, and referential cleanup helpers

features.summary: Normalizes session identifiers, reads persisted session summaries, and maintains the latest-session pointer after deletes

nodes.name: src/backend/audio-store.js
nodes.summary: Local audio binary and metadata persistence helpers

features.summary: Writes uploaded audio blobs, reads audio metadata, and deletes unreferenced audio assets

nodes.name: src/backend/remote-store.js
nodes.summary: Remote session and audio transport helpers

features.summary: Wraps remote fetch logic for session summaries, session detail, session writes, deletes, and audio uploads

nodes.name: URL.createObjectURL
nodes.summary: In-memory object URL used for selected local audio file

nodes.name: data/session-latest.json
nodes.summary: Project-local persisted session record including audio payload and playback state

edges.note: UI loads browser auth state helper
UI loads shared formatting and normalization helpers
UI loads the full frontend runtime directly
UI loads compatibility bootstrap shim after the runtime
Backend request parsing and response helpers
Backend auth session and request validation layer
Backend session storage and cleanup helpers
Backend audio blob and metadata helpers
Backend remote transport helpers when SESSION_STORE=remote
Latest session pointer and persisted session files
